questions.question: Which periodic trend generally increases as you move from left to right across a period and decreases down a group?
What type of chemical bond involves the complete electrostatic attraction between oppositely charged ions formed via electron transfer?
According to the VSEPR theory, what is the geometric molecular shape of a methane (CH4) molecule?
What is the name of the principle stating that orbitals are filled by electrons starting from the lowest energy level upwards?
What is the absolute number of representative particles contained within exactly one mole of any substance?
Which group of elements on the periodic table possess completely filled valence electron shells, making them exceptionally unreactive?
What is the term used to describe variants of a particular chemical element that share the same number of protons but have different numbers of neutrons?
Which law states that the total pressure exerted by a mixture of non-reactive gases is equal to the sum of the partial pressures of individual gases?
What type of intramolecular bond is formed when two atoms share electrons unequally due to a difference in their electronegativities?
What transition element is the primary component of the coordination complex known as cisplatin, a widely used chemotherapy drug?
